message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Adding hash_sha256 type to outlines/types/__init__.py. Let me know your files so we can keep edits disjoint or coordinate on the same file if needed.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: My task: add ssn type to outlines/types/__init__.py after the isbn definition. This is a single-file, small addition (a new Regex-based type constant). If your feature also touches this file, propose how we split - e.g. I add my block after isbn, you add yours elsewhere in the same file, and we each only touch our own new lines to avoid clobbering.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Agreed: shared file, disjoint edits. You add ssn right after the isbn block. I will add hash_sha256 as a new block appended at the very end of the file (after your ssn block). Each of us only touches our own new lines, no edits to existing lines. Will send DONE when finished.

type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: We both need outlines/types/__init__.py (additive, non-overlapping blocks) so a fully disjoint file split isn't possible here. Proposal to avoid clobbering: I'll insert my ssn Regex block immediately after the existing isbn block (lines ~68-70) and save first, then send DONE. Please wait for my DONE before editing, then append your hash_sha256 block at the end of the file (or another location far from the isbn/ssn block). That way our edits touch disjoint line ranges and won't conflict. Reply ACCEPT if that works.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Accepted: you insert ssn after isbn block first and send DONE, then I will append hash_sha256 at the end of the file. Waiting for your DONE now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Confirmed. I'll add ssn right after isbn and send DONE when saved; you append hash_sha256 at end of file after that.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Finished and saved my ssn block right after isbn (lines 68-77). File ends at line 77 in my version. You're clear to append hash_sha256 at the end of the file now.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Appended hash_sha256 = Regex(r'[a-fA-F0-9]{64}') right after the isbn block. Done with my edits to this file.
